description_long: This object is a double-action revolver with a robust, metallic frame and a long, vented barrel. The cylinder is visible and appears to hold six rounds, with a prominent ejector rod beneath the barrel. The grip is ergonomically contoured, made of a dark, likely synthetic or composite material, and features visible screws and subtle texturing for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement, while the hammer is exposed and serrated for manual cocking. The finish of the revolver is a matte, slightly worn dark metal with some brass or gold-toned highlights along the edges, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance.
description: A long-barreled, dark metal revolver with a contoured black grip and visible cylinder, featuring brass-toned highlights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the revolver, including the vented barrel, exposed cylinder, and detailed grip with visible screws.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel and cylinder, with the width of the grip and frame visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the revolver, including the cylinder, grip, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle opening, barrel venting, and the front profile of the grip and trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a dark, matte finish that suggests a polymer or composite material. It has a smooth surface with subtle texturing for improved grip, and is secured with visible screws. The lower portion of the grip is slightly flared, and there are no visible logos or finger grooves, giving it a clean, functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that provides ample protection for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured without any undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks additional texturing or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian, focusing on durability and safety.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and features venting along the top, which may aid in recoil reduction. It has a standard round profile with a matte, slightly worn finish and brass-toned highlights along the edges. There are no visible threads, compensators, or suppressor attachments, and the exterior is free of markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible slide markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the exterior surfaces of the revolver. The finish is plain, with only subtle wear and brass-toned highlights providing visual interest.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is flat and slightly beveled, with a single visible screw and no finger rest, logo, or additional texturing.
